issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage for Kafka operations.
The skill only provides Node.js and Python examples, missing Java and Go implementations.

scenarios.name: Stand up a local single-node Kafka in KRaft mode (no ZooKeeper) via Docker Compose
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses bitnami/kafka with KAFKA_CFG_PROCESS_ROLES=broker,controller, KAFKA_CFG_NODE_ID=1, both PLAINTEXT and CONTROLLER listeners (9092/9093), KAFKA_CFG_CONTROLLER_QUORUM_VOTERS=1@kafka:9093, and KAFKA_CFG_CONTROLLER_LISTENER_NAMES=CONTROLLER; baseline likely uses a ZooKeeper-based compose or wstunes/confluent images without the KRaft env vars.

scenarios.name: Implement an ordered orders producer + consumer-group consumer in Node.js with kafkajs
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses kafkajs with `Partitioners.DefaultPartitioner`, sends with a partition `key` (order id) so related events land on the same partition, and consumes with `groupId: 'order-service'` plus idempotent handling and SIGTERM disconnect; baseline omits the partition-key ordering pattern and the explicit DefaultPartitioner.
